title: Sheepish's Fragments
description: Allow players to craft Mob Spawners in Survival. Harvest souls of every vanilla mob to make any spawner.
body:
This mod adds:

- Craft cut diamonds from 3 diamonds - Craft diamond sticks (used in crafting the new tools) from diamond fragments and stick - Spawner Fragments - Gained from breaking mob spawners with a silk touch pickaxe - Use 4 and 4 iron bars to craft a mob spawner - Souls for EVERY vanilla mob - Small chance for a mob to drop their soul upon death - Soul Reaper Enchantment - Killing a mob with a tool with this enchantment has a higher chance of getting its soul - Soul Infusing Table - Combine 4 souls of the same mob type and an egg to gain a spawn egg - New Diamond Shears - Shears Upgrade Template found in villages - Use diamonds in one hand and diamond (or greater) shears in the other to get diamond fragments - More wool from sheep - Too sharp to collect leaves, grass, etc - Shearing Enchantment - Increases number of wool from sheep - Level 3 has a low chance to shave more diamond fragments off of a single diamond - Cut Diamond Tools - Diamond Blade, Sharpened Diamond Pickaxe, Diamond Excavator, Diamond Battle Axe and Diamond Scythe - Diamond Scythe can gather more souls from mobs - Sharper and faster than regular diamond tools - Cannot be upgraded to netherite


Known bugs:

- Spawn Eggs lose color --> Recommended to use a resource pack which replaces these textures such as [YSBB's Spawn Eggs](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/mcopper-texture-spawn-egg/)
